subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! God hath verily been well-pleased with thee, and hath ordained for thee in the Tablet a station that is, in truth, most exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا فقد رضی الله عنک و قدر لک فی اللوح مقاما کان علی الحق رفیعا ثم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
